name: VideoSDK
description: VideoSDK — programmable real-time video, audio, and live streaming SDK

seo.title: VideoSDK — Real-time / WebSocket Infrastructure
seo.meta_description: VideoSDK: VideoSDK — programmable real-time video, audio, and live streaming SDK

when_to_use: Programmable real-time video and audio SDK for 15+ platforms
Adding group video calling to apps with minimal code
Live streaming and recording from SDK-based applications
Interactive video features without managing WebRTC infrastructure
AI-powered meeting assistants via VideoSDK integration

pros: All-in-one real-time video, audio and live SDK
Competitive pricing vs big US vendors
cons: Smaller brand and community than Agora/Twilio
Some features rely on managed infra lock-in
Occasional SDK stability reports in forums
Advanced customization can hit platform limits
review.verdict: Fast path to ship video features if pre-built UI and bundled media services matter more than deep customization.
review.best_for: Startups shipping video/live features quickly with low ops
review.not_for: Teams needing deep control over media pipelines
